name: Pasta with Anchovy and Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. If using salted whole anchovies, wash them in cold running water to remove most of the external salt and any tiny scales.
2. Pull the fillets from the bones and discard the bones.
3. Set the fillets aside.
4. Open the clams or use pre-opened ones, reserving both the clams and 1 cup of clam juice.
5. Finely chop the clams and set aside.
6. Heat olive oil and butter in a skillet.
7. Add garlic and shallots; cook until light brown.
8. Add anchovies and stir until they dissolve.
9. Incorporate parsley, rosemary, reserved clam juice, and white wine; bring to a boil.
10. Add pepper and a pinch of salt; simmer for 15 minutes.
11. Add chopped clams and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Serve hot over the cooked pasta. Optionally serve red pepper flakes on the side, but no cheese.
